issues.description: Missing passive effect for hand-size cost penalty. Card has two distinct effects: (1) passive 'If you have 5+ cards in hand, +1 cost' and (2) [On Play] ability. DSL only captures OnPlay.

Rest action does not implement 'cannot attack' restriction. Rest only exhausts; it does not prevent future attacks. Required action is GiveKeyword with keyword 'CannotAttack' or equivalent, OR a custom restriction that persists until end of opponent's next End Phase.

Duration missing. Text states 'cannot attack until the end of your opponent's next End Phase'—this is a timed restriction (DuringOpponentTurn, ending at a specific phase), not permanent. Rest has no duration parameter to enforce this expiry.
Condition 'up to 1' (max target count=1) not encoded. Filter or action target should specify maxTargets:1.
